title: Pursuer-Distancer Dynamic in Relationships
description: A common relationship pattern where one person tends to pursue closeness (pursuer) while the other tends to create distance (distancer) when things get emotionally intense. This often creates a cycle that increases distress for both people.
observation_language: It seems like when you want more closeness, the other person tends to pull away, and when they come closer, you sometimes feel overwhelmed.
There appears to be a recurring push-pull dynamic in your relationships that leaves both people feeling frustrated.
It looks like this pattern of pursuing and distancing might be creating more disconnection than either of you wants.
